attempts.lean_error: stuck on φ''/H₁/H₂ data (the ~150 LOC coherence wall)
attempts.insight: sliceStructureSheafHom φ.symm Vᵢ does NOT fit φ'' (codomain type mismatch: lands in Over (φ.hom⁻¹ᵁ Vᵢ), slot demands eqv.inverse carrying the Over.map (unitIso.inv) correction into Over Uᵢ). KEY INSIGHT: φ'' is object-level correction-FREE — over W, the codomain section is Γ over (eqv.inverse.obj W).left = φ.hom⁻¹ᵁ W.left because Over.map leaves .left unchanged; so φ'' = (overPullback Vᵢ).map φ.hom.toRingCatSheafHom transported by eqToHom. The correction lives only in H₁/H₂ (morphism action).
